curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modified only src/runtime/parser/utils/props.ts (the validateProp function). The patch replaced a simple string prefix check with a new isAnchorLinkAllowed function that decodes HTML entities and URL-encoded characters before validating against the deny list. Sibling files in the same directory (html-tags-list.ts, plugins.ts) serve different roles and do not contain URL validation logic. Pre-assigned vulnerability class xss confirmed — CWE-79 matches the advisory description of XSS via HTML entity-encoded javascript: protocol bypass.
